nasb.text: “Then I will give you shepherds after My own heart, who will feed you on knowledge and understanding.

esv.text: “‘And I will give you shepherds after my own heart, who will feed you with knowledge and understanding.

cnv.text: “我必把合我心意的牧人賜給你們，他們要用知識和智慧牧養你們。

ccb.text: “我要赐给你们合我心意的牧人，让他们用知识与智慧牧养你们。
